title: Borea
description: Originally created for my private server, this project takes the classic vanilla experience and enhances it. It’s a carefully balanced overhaul that spices things up without losing the core feel of the original game.
body:
This modpack was originally designed for a private server, offering a light but fresh spin on Minecraft. It’s like Vanilla Plus, but without the heavy load, adding just enough to keep things interesting without overwhelming the game.

What’s included:

  - **Overhauled Nether & End** – New biomes and environments that feel fresh but still fit the world.
    
  - **Weather in the Nether** – Dynamic weather events that change up the atmosphere.
    
  - **YUNG's Better Series** – A collection of smarter structures and more engaging exploration.
    
  - **Friends & Foes** – The missing Mobs from the Mob-Vote
    
  - **More food Variety** – A wider variety of ingredients and recipes to spice up your meals.
    
  - **Extra biomes** – More variety in the world without flooding it with unnecessary blocks.
    
  - **Mix of Magic & Technology** – A bit of both for those who want to play with power, however they choose.
    
  - **Block variants** – More ways to customize your builds.
    
  - **Quality-of-life improvements** – Little changes that just make the game smoother and more fun.
  

I hope you enjoy it and have a good time playing
